rationale: China arresting a US researcher on espionage charges is a fresh bilateral escalation directly relevant to US residents; Trump's Iran credibility story continues as domestic political noise.

top_events.title: China arrests US researcher at conference for 'espionage activities'
top_events.summary: China detaining a US academic escalates bilateral tensions with direct implications for US-China relations, academic exchanges, and potential market/policy responses affecting Americans.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Tehran publicly contradicting Trump undermines the administration's diplomatic credibility and keeps Middle East uncertainty alive, with mild oil market and political implications for US residents.

top_events.title: Toronto police officer shot while investigating US consulate attack
top_events.summary: Attack near a US consulate in Canada is a security incident with direct US institutional relevance, though no confirmed broader threat to US soil at this stage.
